target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Widespread collapse of structural elements; extensive debris field covering ground; visible absence of intact walls or roof; consistent with 75-100% structural damage.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, showing widespread collapse and extensive debris. The scene depicts a single, heavily damaged structure with collapsed walls, exposed interiors, and a large pile of red brick rubble covering the ground. The functional impact is complete loss of structural integrity and utility, consistent with the prior assessment.
